---
title: "Why a Working Paper Series on Critical Search Now"
author:
  - name: Jo Guldi
    affiliation: Emory University
  - name: Jim Clifford
    affiliation: University of Saskatchewan
date: "2026-05-05"

paper_id: "001"
type: "short"
version: "v1.0"
doi: "10.5281/zenodo.20028066"

categories:
  - critical search
  - editorial
  - infrastructure

external: "https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-001-introduction/"
---

This paper is published at its own site:
[→ Read the paper](https://working-papers-in-critical-search.github.io/paper-001-introduction/)

The canonical version lives in the paper's own repository. This page exists
only so the main journal listing can index the paper's metadata.
